query:
INSERT INTO episodes
            (
                username, device,
                podcast, episode,
                timestamp, guid,
                action,
                started, position, total,
                modified
            )
            VALUES
            (
                ?, ?,
                ?, ?,
                NULL, NULL,
                "New",
                NULL, NULL, NULL,
                1 -- `modified` value we expect to be overwritten
                -- `hash` is defaulted to ""
            ),
            (
                "u2", "dev2", -- this row won't be picked up - different user
                "pod2", "ep2",
                NULL, NULL,
                "New",
                NULL, NULL, NULL,
                2
            )
